name: Asparagus or Spinach Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions, then drain and cut in half.
2. In a saucepan, cook garlic and thyme in butter. Gradually blend in flour, stirring constantly until thickened.
3. Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Assemble layers in a microwaveable dish: 1/3 noodles, sauce, cheese, ham, and asparagus or spinach. Repeat these layers two more times.
5. Cover the dish and cook on high for 9-10 minutes, rotating the dish twice.
